title: Enterprise GenAI readiness assessment: A consulting framework for scaling AI safely
description: If you have sat in on AI strategy meetings lately, the tone has probably shifted. Early excitement about generative AI pilots is giving way to more cautious conversations. title: How Google helped Levi’s turn employee’s hackathon idea into AI tool that helps shoppers
description: Levi Strauss & Co. partnered with Google Cloud to develop STITCH, an AI tool for store associates. This tool, powered by Gemini's large language models, helps staff answer customer questions and access product information, leading to an eight-point improvement in customer satisfaction in pilot stores.

title: UMEVO Redefines Value in AI Hardware with 1-Year Free Unlimited Transcription for Its AI Voice Recorder
